name: brand-loom
description: Open-source marketing skills that run on any model. Hooks, captions, hashtags, repurposing, SEO outlines, FAQs, schema.org markup, CTAs. BYOK. Hosted brand-memory engine at neoxra.com.
author: hogan-tech

skills.name: hook
skills.description: Marketing hooks and headlines, on any model
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: hooks, headlines, opening lines, scroll-stoppers for social or SEO

skills.name: caption
skills.description: Platform captions from a topic with brand voice
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: social media captions, post copy, platform-specific text

skills.name: hashtags
skills.description: Relevant, deduped hashtag sets for any topic
skills.author: hogan-tech

skills.name: repurpose
skills.description: Repurpose content across formats (short, thread, carousel)
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: content repurposing, format conversion, cross-platform adaptation

skills.name: seo-outline
skills.description: Structured SEO article outlines with section planning
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: SEO outlines, article planning, content structure, blog post skeletons

skills.name: faq
skills.description: Generate FAQ question-answer pairs from any content
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: FAQs, Q&A sections, knowledge base entries, help content

skills.name: schema-org
skills.description: FAQPage / Article / Breadcrumb JSON-LD (no LLM needed)
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: schema.org markup, JSON-LD, structured data, SEO rich snippets

skills.name: cta
skills.author: hogan-tech
skills.when_to_use: CTAs, buttons, conversion copy, action prompts, closing lines
